title: 'Volume 1' row: Yo Yo Honey Singh tells Delhi HC he did not sing vulgar song at 2025 concert
description: Singer and rapper Yo Yo Honey Singh today told the Delhi High Court that he did not sing the controversial 'Volume 1' song at a March 2025 concert, as claimed by the Hindu Shakti Dal in its petition to ban the song. Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav has directed Honey Singh to file an affidavit with his reply to the allegations of obscenity made by Hindu Shakti Dal its petition.Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav On April 2, the Court had ordered a blanket ban on the song, stating t
